summary: Completed comprehensive testing of three role-based dashboards (Admin, Producer, Customer). All backend APIs (30/30 tests passed) and frontend UI tests successful. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in product creation endpoint.
passed_tests: Admin Dashboard: Login as admin@hispaloshop.com/admin123 - SUCCESS
Admin Dashboard: Navigate to /admin - SUCCESS (shows Overview with stats)
Admin Dashboard: Producers page - SUCCESS (shows list with View/Approve buttons)
Admin Dashboard: Producer detail view - SUCCESS (shows company info, Reject/Pause buttons)
Admin Dashboard: Products page - SUCCESS (shows products with Approve/Delete actions)
Admin Dashboard: Certificates page - SUCCESS
Admin Dashboard: Orders & Payments page - SUCCESS
Admin: Approve/Reject producer functionality - SUCCESS (API tested)
Admin: Approve/Delete product functionality - SUCCESS (API tested)
Producer Dashboard: Login as producer@test.com/producer123 - SUCCESS
Producer Dashboard: Navigate to /producer - SUCCESS (shows Overview with stats)
Producer Dashboard: My Products page - SUCCESS (shows products with status)
Producer Dashboard: Create new product form - SUCCESS (all fields present)
Producer Dashboard: Certificates page - SUCCESS
Producer Dashboard: Orders page - SUCCESS
Producer Dashboard: Payments page - SUCCESS
Customer Dashboard: Login as test@example.com/password123 - SUCCESS
Customer Dashboard: Navigate to /dashboard - SUCCESS (shows Overview with orders)
Customer Dashboard: My Orders page - SUCCESS
Customer Dashboard: Profile page - SUCCESS (Profile, Password, Dietary Preferences tabs)
Customer: Update dietary preferences - SUCCESS (Vegan, Gluten-Free, Allergens working)
All dashboards: Back to Store navigation - SUCCESS
All dashboards: Logout functionality - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users and products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three role-based dashboards fully functional. Admin can manage producers/products/certificates/orders. Producer can manage their products and view orders/payments. Customer can view orders and update dietary preferences. All dashboards have shared layout pattern with sidebar navigation, Back to Store, and Logout buttons. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId bug in product creation endpoint.

bug_fix_applied.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error when creating products
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added product.pop('_id', None) after insert_one to remove MongoDB ObjectId before returning response

admin_dashboard.overview: Stats cards (Producers, Products, Certificates, Orders) with pending counts
admin_dashboard.producers: Table with Company, Contact, Status columns; View/Approve actions
admin_dashboard.producer_detail: Company info, contact details, VAT; Approve/Reject/Pause actions
admin_dashboard.products: Table with Product, Producer, Price, Status; Approve/Delete actions; Create Product form

producer_dashboard.overview: Stats (Total Products, Orders, Total Sold, Earnings); Quick Actions
producer_dashboard.my_products: Table with Product, Price, Status; View/Edit actions; Create Product button
producer_dashboard.create_product: Form with Name, Category, Description, Price, Country, Image URL, Ingredients, Allergens, Certifications

customer_dashboard.overview: Stats (Total Orders, Pending Orders); Recent Orders; Quick Actions
customer_dashboard.my_orders: List of customer's orders with status
customer_dashboard.profile: Three tabs - Profile (name, country), Password, Dietary Preferences
customer_dashboard.dietary_preferences: Diet Types (Vegan, Vegetarian, etc.), Allergens to Avoid, Health Goals

common_features.back_to_store: Works on all dashboards - navigates to homepage
common_features.logout: Works on all dashboards - navigates to login page
common_features.sidebar_navigation: All nav items clickable and functional
